title: Luxury Fashion Editorial Three-Panel Composition
sourceTitle: Luxury Fashion Editorial Three Panel Black Suit Composite AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 1:1 luxury fashion editorial three-panel composite of adult high-fashion model with calm confident expression on a cool-grey studio background. Subject: adult high-fashion model with calm confident expression remains the same identity across all frames, wearing all-black blazer, shirt, and slim trousers with clean high-realism fashion presence. Scene: Cool-grey studio background with premium spacing, soft studio lighting, high realism, clean Vogue-style editorial tone, and modern black executive aesthetic. Composition: Three-panel composite: center panel is top close-up portrait, middle half-body confident standing pose, bottom dynamic stylish pose with different angle and hand placement; left panel shows full-body all-black blazer power stance, one hand in pocket, other adjusting lapel, low-angle runway energy; right panel shows full-body all-black shirt and slim trousers walking or leaning at a 3/4 angle with one hand in pocket; ultra-thin silver/white divider lines keep the layout precise. Signature Elements: Preserved luxury fashion editorial three panel black suit composite source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Ultra-realistic luxury fashion editorial, Vogue-level finish, cinematic lighting, clean composition, modern black executive campaign mood, premium spacing, and high-end collage design. Color Palette: Cool grey studio tones, all-black wardrobe, silver-white divider lines, soft haze, realistic skin tones, and restrained luxury highlights. Lighting: Soft luxury studio light, rim light on full-body panels, subtle haze, clear portrait eye contact, and polished editorial exposure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
